====Pokémon X and Y====
Korrina is a young girl with a slender, athletic build and fair complexion. She has blue-gray eyes and very long, knee-length cream-blonde hair tied in a big, thick, high fluffy ponytail that emerges from the back of her helmet. She is noted to have powerful legs; the [[television]] show Gym Freaks mentions that her axe-kicks can shatter rocks.

Korrina wears a typical skater attire, consisting of a short white and red sleeveless dress over black cycling shorts and a white and red helmet on her head. In her left hand she holds the Mega Glove, where her [[Key Stone]] is embedded on. She also wears white rollerskate boots with red decals.
